images/image9.jpg.description: A swift aquatic predator that uses the force of the tides to strike its prey with surgical precision.
images/image9.jpg.name: Swordfish

images/image57.jpg.description: An ancient sentinel of the forest. Its bark is as hard as iron, and it commands the roots beneath your feet.
images/image57.jpg.name: Walking Tree

images/image60.jpg.description: An animated mass of rock and clay, bound by forgotten runes. It ignores minor scratches and delivers earth-shaking blows.
images/image60.jpg.name: Earth Golem

images/image7.jpg.description: A regal beast combining the majesty of a lion and the keen vision of an eagle. It attacks from above with sun-blinded fury.
images/image7.jpg.name: Gryphon

images/image23.jpg.description: Cruel scavengers of the high peaks. Their shrieks can disorient even the most seasoned warriors before they swoop in.
images/image23.jpg.name: Harpy

images/image63.jpg.description: A swirling vortex of unstable air. It has no physical form but strikes with the pressure of a localized hurricane.
images/image63.jpg.name: Wind Fury

images/image37.jpg.description: Molten rock given life by the deepest magma. It burns everything it touches and is exceptionally resistant to physical impact.
images/image37.jpg.name: Lava Golem

images/image65.jpg.description: A manifestation of pure combustion. Its heat is so intense that simply standing near it can ignite the very air.
images/image65.jpg.name: Fire Elemental

images/image49.jpg.description: A celestial warrior of flame. It represents the destructive power of a dying star and hides its weaknesses behind a blinding aura.
images/image49.jpg.name: Fire Avatar

images/image66.jpg.description: A lumbering giant composed of iron ore. It uses magnetic pulses to attract and crush anything made of metal.
images/image66.jpg.name: Magnetic Golem

images/image79.jpg.description: An erratic spark of high-voltage energy. It moves faster than the eye can follow, leaving ozone and cinders in its wake.
images/image79.jpg.name: Lightning Fury

images/image31.jpg.description: Fallen soldiers raised by a lingering curse. They fight with a mechanical persistence and have no fear of pain or death.
images/image31.jpg.name: Skeletons

images/image48.jpg.description: The sovereign master of the crypts. He commands both the rot of the grave and the chilling void of the shadow realm.
images/image48.jpg.name: Lich King

images/image21.jpg.description: A nightmare made manifest. This ancient dragon breathes shadow-fire and is largely immune to the very elements its scales embody.
images/image21.jpg.name: Enderdragon
